title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at ABB India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at ABB India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? ABB India International Enterprises in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About ABB India International Enterprises:
ABB India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India International Enterprises!
